input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.1.1
            TITLE: documentation of material type, (purchase receipt, shipping document or letter of donation)

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.1.1: Documentation of material type, (purchase receipt, shipping document or letter of donation)
F.4.1.1 Documentation of material type, (purchase receipt, shipping document or letter of donation) 
and the material properties.

final_answer: Documentation of material type, (purchase receipt, shipping document or letter of donation) and the material properties.
